pkgmetadata.longdescription: Z3 is a theorem prover from Microsoft Research with support for bitvectors, booleans, arrays, floating point numbers, strings, and other data types.For documentation, please read httpz3prover.github.ioapihtmlz3.htmlIn the event of technical difficulties related to configuration, compilation, or installation, please submit issues to httpsgithub.comz3proverz3.git
